Houston hairstylist · appointment only

Healthy hair with a little main character energy.

Glossy. Bouncy. Blended. Flirty. Healthy.

Nia Nowlin, known as The Hairstylista, creates polished, touchable styles for every texture with a healthy-hair-first approach. From silk presses and protective styling to her client-loved U-part wig installation, the finish is soft, feminine, and camera-ready without forgetting the hair underneath.

Meet Nia

A stylist who can do the cute style — and protect the crown.

Nia is a multi-talented Houston hairstylist who works across hair types, textures, and style goals. Her chair is for clients who want versatility, polish, and a stylist who understands that healthy hair is the real luxury.

Whether you are coming in for a sleek finish, a protective look, a refreshed install, or a full confidence reset, the appointment is designed to feel personal, feminine, and easy.

What she does

Styles for every texture, mood, and moment.

No stiff salon menu energy. Just clear lanes so clients know where they fit.

01

Healthy Hair Care

Care-forward styling that keeps the health of the hair at the center: moisture, maintenance, trims, finish, and long-term hair confidence.

02

Silk Press + Styling

Smooth, soft, bouncy finishes for clients who want movement, shine, and a polished look without losing the personality of their hair.

03

Wig Installs

Clean, secure, natural-looking installs with special attention to blend, comfort, and a finished look that photographs beautifully.

04

All Textures

Natural hair, relaxed hair, extensions, protective looks, soft glam styling, and versatile finishes for different textures and lifestyles.

05

Braided Styles

Braided looks for men and women, from clean everyday styles to fun protective looks that still feel polished, comfortable, and photo-ready.

Client favorite

The U-Part Wig Installation

Nia’s signature U-part install is the pretty little secret clients come back for: a natural leave-out blend, soft movement, and a polished finish that still feels like you.

  • Natural leave-out blend
  • Soft, feminine finish
  • Protective styling option
  • Appointment-only attention

The salon atmosphere

Relaxed, welcoming, and actually fun.

The Hairstylista chair is easy, inviting, and kid-welcoming. Snack breaks are fine, phone calls are fine, and the appointment can feel less like sitting through a service and more like hanging out with your girls. Come get cute, bring the kids when you need to, take a breather, laugh a little, and leave with hair that feels as good as the visit.

The looks

Proof in the polish.

Real client looks, soft glam moments, protective styles, braids, bundles, and healthy-hair finishes from The Hairstylista chair.

your chair, your moment

Soft glam. Healthy hair. Zero guesswork.

Come with the screenshot, the occasion, the maintenance question, or the “I need a whole new mood” feeling. Nia helps you choose the look, protect the hair underneath, and walk out with a style that makes sense for your real life.

01 · consult 02 · style plan 03 · install or finish 04 · care tips 05 · braids for men & women

Ready for your chair moment?

Nia works by appointment only Tuesday through Saturday inside Salon Meyerland in Houston, Texas.
